creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
<quote who="Andriy Galetski">

Hello,

First of all; thanks for taking the time to submit this PR. I have some
comments though: This is not a PR, a PR means a problem, and your issue
might be a problem for you, but it's not yet a real problem (can you
still follow me? :-)). To get proper support and information I would
like to ask you to go to the freebsd-stable and/or freebsd-pf
mailinglist(s) and ask the question you have there first. If after
several opinions and discussions people think this is a PR worth,
please contact me and I Will add the current information to the
audit-trial and reopen the ticket (Yes i will be closing it in a
little).

Please do not feel offended, this is to help you (and us) get the
answers quicker and via the correct way. Checkout the
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo pages for more information
about our mailinglists.

Again thanks for taking the time to submit this and thanks for using
FreeBSD!

Cheers,
Remko
-- 
Kind regards,

   Remko Lodder  ** remko@elvandar.org
        FreeBSD  ** remko@FreeBSD.org

   /* Quis Custodiet ipsos custodes */
